topic: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While)

passage.title: A Day with Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While)
passage.text: I drink both tea and coffee. I was tired, but I finished the work. Would you like tea or coffee? I was late, so I left quickly. I came late because there was traffic. Although he was tired, he kept working. I was cooking while she was studying. She is smart and hardworking. I like this, but it is expensive. You can go now or later.
passage.hindiTranslation: मैं चाय और कॉफी दोनों पीता हूँ। मैं थका हुआ था, लेकिन मैंने काम पूरा किया। क्या तुम चाय या कॉफी पीना चाहोगे? मुझे देर हो गई, इसलिए मैं जल्दी निकला। मैं देर से आया क्योंकि ट्रैफिक था। हालांकि वह थका हुआ था, वह काम करता रहा। मैं खाना बना रहा था जबकि वह पढ़ रही थी। वह smart और मेहनती है। मुझे यह पसंद है, लेकिन यह महंगा है। तुम अभी जा सकते हो या बाद में।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I drink both tea..."?
options: She is smart and hardworking.
We were happy and excited.
I was tired, but I finished the work.
I drink both tea and coffee.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I drink both tea and coffee.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I drink both tea and coffee."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I was tired, but..."?
options: I like this, but it is expensive.

comprehensionQuestions.answer: I was tired, but I finished the work.

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "Would you like tea..."?

Would you like tea or coffee?
comprehensionQuestions.answer: Would you like tea or coffee?

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I was late, so..."?
options: It was raining, so we stayed inside.

I came late because there was traffic.

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "She is smart and..."?
